---
title: "Pediatric medevac: descriptive report"
subtitle: "Summary tables and figures"
date: today
date-format: long
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    theme: cosmo
    df-print: paged
    embed-resources: true
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| include: false
import os
import sys
from pathlib import Path

# Quarto sets this when rendering a project; otherwise assume cwd is repo root
_proj = Path(os.environ.get("QUARTO_PROJECT_DIR", Path.cwd())).resolve()
sys.path.insert(0, str(_proj / "analysis"))

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import pandas as pd
from IPython.display import Markdown, display

from medevac_summaries import (
    load_data,
    build_table0_medevac_routes,
    build_table1_patient_characteristics,
    build_table1_cohort,
    build_table2_by_origin,
    build_table3_by_year,
    build_timing_category_tables,
    build_table5_timing_minutes,
    build_table6_mortality,
    plot_fig1_medevac_activation_map,
    plot_fig1_journeys_by_month,
    plot_fig2_origin_pie,
    plot_fig2_origin_bar,
    plot_fig3_journey_duration,
    plot_fig4_activation_vs_arrival_village_cah,
    plot_fig5_medevacs_per_journey,
    plot_fig6_medevacs_per_patient,
)

df = load_data()


def show_tbl(d: pd.DataFrame):
    """Render tables without the leading 0,1,2… index column."""
    return d.style.hide(axis="index")
```

## Data

Journeys come from `pediatric_medevac_journeys.csv`, merged with `pediatric_medevac_timing.csv` and `pediatric_outcomes.csv`. Village clinics use **Maniilaq community names** (see `docs/village_name_codebook.md`).

## Table 0. Medevac legs by route

Each **leg** is one medevac on a travel authorization (up to three per journey). **Origins** are grouped: all village clinics in one row, and legs starting at Maniilaq Health Center (MHC) separately. **Destinations** are explicit: MHC, ANMC, UW, or Providence. **% (n)** is percent of all legs.

```{python}
show_tbl(build_table0_medevac_routes())
```

## Table 1. Patient characteristics

**Denominator:** unique patients (*n* = earliest medevac per patient by `medevac1_date`) for % (n) rows. The first two rows are cohort totals. Age is mean (SD) in years at first medevac. Villages are **first medevac origin** (`facility_1_name`).

```{python}
show_tbl(build_table1_patient_characteristics(df))
```

^* Add column **`AI_AN`** (1 = yes) or **`RaceDSC`** to `pediatric_patients.csv` for AI/AN row.  
^** **`PrimaryPayorNM`** on `pediatric_patients.csv` (one row per patient); each payor shown as % (n).  
^*** Village rows are mutually exclusive with “Non-village first site.”

## Cohort overview (journeys)

```{python}
show_tbl(build_table1_cohort(df))
```

## By origin type

```{python}
show_tbl(build_table2_by_origin(df))
```

## Journeys by calendar year

```{python}
show_tbl(build_table3_by_year(df))
```

## Timing categories

```{python}
for col, tbl in build_timing_category_tables(df).items():
    display(Markdown(f"**{col.replace('_', ' ')}**"))
    display(show_tbl(tbl))
```

## Continuous timing (minutes)

Village → Maniilaq Health Center only:

```{python}
show_tbl(build_table5_timing_minutes(df, village_cah_only=True))
```

All origin types:

```{python}
show_tbl(build_table5_timing_minutes(df, village_cah_only=False))
```

## Mortality (journey-level)

```{python}
_m = build_table6_mortality(df)
show_tbl(_m if _m is not None else pd.DataFrame({"note": ["No mortality columns in outcomes."]}))
```

## Figures

```{python}
#| label: fig-map-mhc
#| fig-cap: "Figure 1. Village clinic medevac legs to Maniilaq Health Center (Kotzebue). Line width scales with leg count; color with legs per 1,000 population (2020 approx.); marker size with village population."
plot_fig1_medevac_activation_map(df)
```

```{python}
#| label: fig-monthly
#| fig-cap: "Medevac journeys by calendar month."
plot_fig1_journeys_by_month(df)
```

```{python}
#| label: fig-origin-pie
#| fig-cap: "Share of journeys by origin type."
plot_fig2_origin_pie(df)
```

```{python}
#| label: fig-origin-bar
#| fig-cap: "Journey counts by origin type."
plot_fig2_origin_bar(df)
```

```{python}
#| label: fig-duration
#| fig-cap: "Journey duration (hours); upper tail truncated at 99th percentile for display."
plot_fig3_journey_duration(df)
```

```{python}
#| label: fig-timing-scatter
#| fig-cap: "Time to activation vs. arrival at Maniilaq Health Center (village → MHC); extremes trimmed at 98th percentile."
_f4 = plot_fig4_activation_vs_arrival_village_cah(df)
_f4 if _f4 is not None else print("Figure skipped (missing timing columns).")
```

```{python}
#| label: fig-n-medevacs
#| fig-cap: "Number of medevac legs per journey."
plot_fig5_medevacs_per_journey(df)
```

```{python}
#| label: fig-medevacs-per-patient
#| fig-cap: "Patients by total medevac legs (sum of legs across all journeys per MRN)."
plot_fig6_medevacs_per_patient(df)
```

---

To refresh standalone CSV/PNG files: `python analysis/medevac_summaries.py`

To render this report: `quarto render medevac_report.qmd` (from the project directory).
